description: Create crates/oai-runner/src/config.rs. Model to API base URL mapping: minimax/* to https://api.minimax.io/v1, zai/glm to https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4, deepseek to https://api.deepseek.com/v1, openrouter to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1, else require --api-base. API key resolution chain: 1) --api-key flag 2) provider-specific env var (MINIMAX_API_KEY, ZAI_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY) 3) generic OPENAI_API_KEY 4) ~/.local/share/opencode/auth.json provider lookup by base URL.
title: Add API key resolution and model-to-base-URL config
